{{Quote|Sith's blood! Fixing anything in this rot-infested place is an uphill battle!|Zuka|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Zuka''' was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior who was aided by [[Meetra Surik]] in fixing a telemetry [[Computer/Legends|computer]] in the [[Mandalorian Outpost (Dxun)|Mandalorian base]] on [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Fight ferociously, and if you die, take as many as you can with you.|Zuka to Meetra Surik|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />}}
Zuka was the tech specialist for the re-established Mandalorian camp on Dxun. Though [[Gender/Legends|he]] preferred fixing things over combat, he was nonetheless valued by [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]] for his technical skills.

During [[Meetra Surik]]'s visit to the camp, Zuka was the first to discover the infiltrating [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]], setting a trap for one of them and causing the Sith to be caught in an explosion as he decloaked to [[Skirmish on Dxun|attack]] Zuka. He then warned his fellow Mandalorians of the concealed Sith.

Zuka also located the tomb of the ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Freedon Nadd]] on Dxun for Surik just before participating in the [[Battle of Onderon (Onderon Civil War)|Second Battle of Onderon]]. He was also among the Mandalorians who fought in the [[Battle of Telos IV]], where he supervised the placing of [[Proton bomb/Legends|proton cores]] throughout the [[Ravager (Centurion-class)|''Ravager'']]. When one of the proton charges went off prematurely in a Sith counterattack on his position, Zuka was wounded; when he reported the situation to Mandalore he offered up his life in repayment for the botched job, but was rebuffed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
